fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the type of document that the comment applies to.
The program has entered the document type from the sales header.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the document number of the quote or order to which the comment applies.
The program has entered the document number from the sales header.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of times the "No." value has been used in the number series.
This number, in combination with the document number, ensures that you always maintain a unique number for the archived document. This is convenient if, for example, you have changed the number series and, as a result, a conflict of numbers arises.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the version number of the archived document.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document line number of the quote or order to which the comment applies.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number for the comment.

fields.name: Document Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date the comment was created.

fields.name: Doc. No. Occurrence
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a code for the comment. You can enter a maximum of 10 characters, both numbers and letters. Use codes that are easy to remember and that describe the type of comment or customer.
You can use this field to sort existing comments. For example, you can enter the code EU for all comments that pertain to customers in EU countries/regions.

fields.name: Version No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the comment itself. You can enter a maximum of 80 characters, both numbers and letters.
